think:
Good, I've completed the historian pass. Let me review what I did:
1. I recognized that messages 210-243 are a direct continuation of compartment 200-209 (the same DropzoneUploader mock → real API work), so I merged them into a single completed compartment.
2. I correctly identified: - The recursive timer → async loop rewrite (lint conflict) - PowerShell escaping forcing a full component rewrite - Unused duplicate component cleanup - The .env.local port misconfiguration causing 405 - Browser QA completion - Build/lint passing
3. I assigned importance=66 (months-level recall need for substantial concrete work with clear outcomes that will help future sessions).
4. I extracted one causal_incident for the .env.local port issue - this is an external constraint discovery (Next.js .env.local precedence) that future sessions should know about.
5. I placed no U: lines since there were no durable directives - the user just said "계속해줘" (continue).
6. Facts: I extracted: - PROJECT_RULES: Port 18080 for dev verification - ARCHITECTURE: Local UploaderStatus type - CONFIG_VALUES: All the polling constants, upload policy, port settings - NAMING: Document paths and repo name
7. No user_observations since there was no substantive user message in this chunk.
The output is complete and correct.
